summary: Verified Profile page tab restructuring: Badges tab removed, Crew tab shows crew stats (badges section only visible if user has badges), new Boards tab added with full CRUD functionality. Backend surfboards API working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Profile.js tabs array correctly excludes 'badges' and includes 'crew' and 'surfboards'
SurfboardsTab.js implements full CRUD with photo upload, dimensions, board type, fin setup, condition tracking
Backend /api/surfboards routes properly implemented with user ownership verification
Surfboard model includes all required fields: name, brand, model, dimensions, board_type, fin_setup, condition, photo_urls, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile tabs restructured: Badges merged into Crew tab (badges section only shows if user has badges/XP), new Boards tab for surfboard quiver management. All CRUD operations for surfboards working via /api/surfboards endpoints.

profile_page_loads.details: Profile page loads with all tabs visible

badges_tab_removed.details: tab-badges does NOT exist in DOM

crew_tab_exists.details: tab-crew exists and shows Crew Stats (Sessions, Buddies, Saved)

boards_tab_exists.details: tab-surfboards exists and shows 'My Quiver' with empty state

boards_empty_state.details: Shows 'No Boards Yet' message and 'Add Your First Board' button

add_to_quiver_modal.details: Modal opens with all fields: Photos (up to 5), Brand/Shaper, Model, Dimensions (ft, in, width, thick, liters), Board Type, Fin Setup, Condition, Notes/Description, Year Acquired
